practices.title: HTTPS Everywhere
practices.description: All traffic is encrypted using HTTPS with modern TLS 1.3
practices.implementation: SSL/TLS certificate from Let's Encrypt, automatic renewal, strict HSTS headers
practices.impact: Prevents man-in-the-middle attacks and protects user data in transit

practices.title: Content Security Policy
practices.description: Strict CSP headers prevent XSS and injection attacks
practices.implementation: Configured CSP headers blocking inline scripts and external resources except whitelisted
practices.impact: Mitigates 90% of XSS attacks by preventing malicious script injection

practices.title: Automated Dependency Updates
practices.description: Automated security patches for npm dependencies
practices.implementation: GitHub Dependabot configured for weekly security updates with automated testing
practices.impact: Catches and patches known vulnerabilities within 1-2 weeks of release

practices.title: CORS Configuration
practices.description: Strict CORS policies limit cross-origin requests
practices.implementation: Explicit origin whitelist, credentials disabled for cross-origin

practices.title: Security Headers
practices.implementation: All modern security headers configured including HSTS, nosniff, noopen
practices.impact: Prevents clickjacking, MIME-type sniffing, and other common attacks

practices.title: Secure Token Management
practices.implementation: HttpOnly, Secure, SameSite cookies; no tokens in localStorage
practices.impact: Prevents XSS token theft and CSRF attacks

practices.title: Input Validation
practices.description: All user inputs validated and sanitized
practices.implementation: DOMPurify for HTML sanitization, Angular built-in sanitization
practices.impact: Prevents injection attacks and malicious payload execution

practices.title: Rate Limiting
practices.description: API rate limiting to prevent abuse
practices.implementation: nginx rate limiting with configurable thresholds per endpoint
practices.impact: Prevents brute-force attacks and DDoS-style abuse
